steps.title: Connect claim to example
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim about surprising adaptations that help organisms survive adverse conditions. The second sentence gives a specific case: tadpole shrimp embryos can pause development for years during drought.

steps.title: Reject wrong transition signals
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, but the shrimp example supports the general claim. Choice C signals simultaneous separate events. Choice D signals a result, but the adaptation is not caused by the prior sentence. The needed transition introduces an example. The answer is B.
